name: Orthogonal Reslicing and Projection of Fly Brain
description: You are a neurobiologist analyzing a confocal Z-stack of a Drosophila brain. Your goal is to generate a 'side view' (XZ cross-section) projection to visualize the depth of the signal. Using the 'Fly Brain' sample, convert the image stack to 8-bit grayscale and reslice the stack from the 'Top' using 1.0 pixel spacing. Create a Maximum Intensity Projection of the resliced view and save the resulting 256x57 pixel image to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/side_view_projection.tif
